notes: Trigger eval prompts for the GitHub skill. Mix explicit and implicit GitHub CLI/Actions tasks.

evals.query: Check why CI failed on my PR and tell me the first actionable error.
Please reply to this GitHub review comment in-thread once you confirm the fix.
Can you inspect the open PR for branch feature/cache-cleanup and see if one already exists before opening a new one?
Our GitHub Actions matrix is too slow and expensive; reduce duplicate work with minimal YAML churn.
Open an issue in GitHub with the right labels and link it to the parent issue.
Inspect the latest workflow runs and summarize which job is flaky.
Create the PR from this branch using the project template and do not duplicate an existing one.
Optimize our artifact retention and caching in .github/workflows/ci.yml.
Please optimize this GitLab pipeline cache setup.
Write a Python script that reads a JSON file and uploads rows to Postgres.
Review the business logic in this PR diff for race conditions and edge cases.
Debug why pytest is failing locally when I run the suite.
Set up OAuth for our GitHub App integration.
Can you create a Jira ticket and link it to the epic?
Refactor this workflow engine code to be easier to maintain.
Run the linter and fix formatting issues in the repo.
